rationale: Educ. Code §39.024 governs college readiness measures and student assessment correlations. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: "college readiness" means the level of preparation a student must attain in English language arts and mathematics courses to enroll and succeed, without remediation, in an entry-level general education course
_note: No conflict; rule_text is education assessment statute unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
